report.title: WorkflowAI Pro: 120-Day Step-by-Step Implementation Roadmap
report.abstract: This module defines the phased implementation strategy for WorkflowAI Pro. It provides a dependency-aware roadmap covering foundational architecture, compliance hardening, active learning integration, and planetary scaling for large enterprise environments.
report.content:
# 1. Step-by-Step Implementation Roadmap
The implementation follows a four-phase velocity model to ensure safe AGI deployment.
## 1.1 Phase 1: Foundations (Days 1–30) - **Objective**: Establish the secure execution baseline. - **Actions**: 1. Provision AWS Nitro Enclaves and HardwareEnclaveAttestor infrastructure. 2. Implement Model Registry Core with model signing and SPIFFE/SPIRE identity. 3. Deploy GeminiService Gateway with basic REST/gRPC endpoints.
## 1.2 Phase 2: Compliance Hardening (Days 31–60) - **Objective**: Integrate deterministic safety controls. - **Actions**: 1. Activate Sentinel v2.4 GDL sidecars and OPA policy gating. 2. Implement Zero-Trust DLP middleware and PII redaction for RAG retrieval. 3. Generate initial Article 11 Technical Documentation for model baseline.
## 1.3 Phase 3: Intelligence & Collaboration (Days 61–90) - **Objective**: Operationalize workflow intelligence and active learning. - **Actions**: 1. Deploy Workflow Recommendation Engine with initial HGNN weights. 2. Enable Collaborative Prompt Editing with CRDT-based sync. 3. Integrate Active Learning loops for HITL feedback capture.
## 1.4 Phase 4: Scaling & Resilience (Days 91–120) - **Objective**: Terminal alignment and global coordination. - **Actions**: 1. Execute AGI-TRADER-PROD-01 war-game to verify SEV-0 hardware kill-switches. 2. Enable ICGC-AIRF reporting and international treaty sidecars. 3. Release C-Suite Governance Dashboard Alpha.
